summary: Authored 2026-05-14 in response to staging session e06f591f-c564-4bf0-885d-13149457001d turn-1 failure. The composer was asked to build an inline-data → LLM → JSON pipeline (colours rated for teal compatibility) and failed in three ways: (1) misnarrated OPENROUTER_API_KEY as 'needs to be wired in' when list_user_secrets returned available:true for it; (2) used create_blob as a terminal action after set_source/upsert_node rejections, instead of following up with set_source_from_blob; (3) wrote prose narrating failures rather than retrying corrected mutations. Skill amendments H1 (create_blob never terminal — §71 operational consequences) and H2 (credentials narration discipline — §6 convergence guardrails) landed 2026-05-14; this scenario is the RGR verification target. Cost: ~$0.20–$0.50 per run on gpt-5.4-mini depending on convergence depth.
opening_prompt: please create a pipeline which takes 10 random colours (you pick) and sends them to a large language model to rate them for their ability to go with the colour teal (e.g. in interior design) and then save the outputs to a json file

red_criteria.passivity_phrases_note: Standard catch-list. The original turn-1 failure did not use passivity phrases per se, but bailed with a 'I hit a configuration issue' prose — the must_be_valid:true + build_failure_sentinels rules below catch that shape.
build_failure_sentinels: i cannot mark this pipeline complete
red_criteria.build_failure_note: First two are server-injected on completion-claim with failed preflight. The 'create_blob/the-pipeline-is-still-empty' pair guard against the H1 failure mode (service.py _blocking_result_from_tool_invocations). The remaining three catch the H3 failure mode: LLM transform configured with mode:fixed and an output field listed in schema.fields, which the runtime preflight surfaces as 'Edge from source to llm invalid: producer schema X incompatible with consumer schema llmSchema: Missing fields: <output_field>'.
credential_misnarration_phrases: the llm step needs a credential
red_criteria.credential_misnarration_note: RED if any of these phrases appear in the final assistant content. OPENROUTER_API_KEY is available on the staging deploy, so any narration claiming the LLM step lacks credentials is a Tier-1 audit-integrity misstatement per skill §6 'Credential narration discipline'.

green_criteria.must_have_node_kinds_substring_any_of_no: An LLM transform must be wired between the source and the JSON sink. The colour-rating prompt is the whole point of the request.
green_criteria.must_have_outputs_min_note: At least one JSON sink output must be configured.
